paracetamol,ibuprofen.warning: Possible stomach irritation risk. Take with food.

aspirin,ibuprofen.warning: Increased risk of bleeding and gastrointestinal ulcers.

warfarin,aspirin.warning: High risk of severe bleeding. These should rarely be combined without strict medical supervision.

amoxicillin,methotrexate.warning: Amoxicillin may increase the side effects of methotrexate. Careful monitoring required.

lisinopril,ibuprofen.warning: Ibuprofen can decrease the effectiveness of Lisinopril and may increase the risk of kidney problems.

metformin,alcohol.warning: Increased risk of lactic acidosis, a rare but serious metabolic complication.

default.warning: No known severe interactions found in our database for this combination. However, always consult your doctor.
